title: How to Set Up and Connect to the Company VPN
text:
Q: How do I set up and connect to the company VPN on my device?
A: Windows: Step 1 - Click on the Start menu and select 'Settings'. Step 2 - Go to 'Network & Internet' and then select 'VPN'. Step 3 - Click on 'Add a VPN connection'. Step 4 - In the 'VPN provider' dropdown, select 'Windows (built-in)'. Step 5 - Fill in the 'Connection name' (e.g., Company VPN) and 'Server name or address' (provided by IT). Step 6 - Choose 'L2TP/IPsec with pre-shared key' as the VPN type and enter the pre-shared key. Step 7 - Click 'Save'. Step 8 - To connect, go back to the VPN settings, select your VPN, and click 'Connect'. macOS: Step 1 - Click on the Apple menu and select 'System Preferences'. Step 2 - Choose 'Network'. Step 3 - Click the '+' button to add a new connection. Step 4 - In the 'Interface' dropdown, select 'VPN' and choose the VPN type (e.g., L2TP). Step 5 - Enter a name for the VPN connection and click 'Create'. Step 6 - Fill in the 'Server Address' and 'Account Name' (provided by IT). Step 7 - Click 'Authentication Settings' to enter the password and pre-shared key. Step 8 - Click 'OK', then 'Apply', and finally click 'Connect' to establish the VPN connection.
